Subject: My mistake... you last chance

Hi <firstname>

Well, I was supposed to send this note out on Wednesday
night... and it was supposed to be a "24 hour" warning about
the deadline on my crazy "thank you" special.

However, with the wedding on Saturday, things have been a
little topsy-turvy and I didn't get the 24 hour warning
sent.

So I decided to extend the special until NOON eastern time
on Friday. So that makes THIS your 24 hour notice. 

In other words, you need to act now if you want to take
advantage of these unprecedented savings. Go to this link
now:

http://www.goromance.com/MotherOfAllOffers.html



warmly,
Leslie

P.S.> Remember, this special offer ends on Friday at noon eastern:
